--[[ v1.0.0 https://wearedevs.net/obfuscator ]] return(function(...)local B={"\113\067\053\108\113\052\115\089\101\097\057\061","\083\068\114\114\054\075\061\061","\083\052\088\115\101\121\086\116\052\097\082\084\050\078\118\069";"\083\122\106\088\101\118\061\061","\097\115\053\119\101\097\079\114\113\067\073\089\065\067\105\061";"\050\081\113\101\109\105\079\050\105\100\050\051\105\050\047\088\102\070\105\061";"\101\073\072\066\072\105\047\088\105\067\050\087\113\068\113\111\083\110\057\061";"\113\052\069\049\083\052\107\112","\101\078\104\087\065\110\057\061","\043\052\119\078\079\110\114\118\113\068\111\105\065\097\114\079\054\106\105\061";"\072\073\083\088\065\052\106\066\079\105\113\099\101\110\106\104\052\075\061\061";"\101\068\115\114\113\067\107\047","\107\080\106\069\105\105\074\099\054\110\106\067\051\074\069\110\050\049\061\061","\079\105\115\050\109\080\050\098\100\105\079\048";"\054\078\050\119\065\110\101\106","\113\067\053\081\113\080\086\111\065\078\054\061","\054\078\073\108\101\067\053\119","\113\122\106\057\107\073\079\080\051\078\069\088\118\074\104\086\050\088\072\061";"\051\052\069\077\079\074\111\115\109\080\111\116\072\106\075\088";"\065\070\082\112\101\052\049\061";"\065\052\073\088\109\055\061\061","\107\078\119\101\079\110\082\122\072\122\072\049\052\080\111\112";"\050\110\107\070\072\110\101\086\118\074\101\099\050\049\061\061","\054\067\107\114\065\067\049\061";"\054\110\079\099\109\052\069\122";"\065\070\057\061";"\097\115\053\098\101\052\066\061","\101\097\086\099\065\110\057\061","\097\115\053\122\083\049\061\061";"\051\080\079\088\054\048\113\106\113\055\061\061","\065\067\053\114\101\080\107\088\054\078\106\108\101\049\061\061","\083\068\053\108\083\068\073\088","\043\089\075\106\101\090\047\111\043\075\061\061";"\065\070\048\061";"\052\078\107\122\050\068\118\049\102\048\115\100\118\100\082\110\050\067\118\061","\065\067\050\108";"\113\067\073\089\065\067\105\061";"\101\068\073\119\101\118\061\061","\101\110\107\115\083\075\061\061","";"\050\067\073\119\054\067\050\099\057\048\079\106\113\067\050\121\113 local function d(d)return B[d+(-425219+443384)]end do local d=type local p=table.insert local R=table.concat local i=string.len local c=math.floor local o=B local return(function(B,R,i,c,o,q,k,T,X,K,g,N,t,x,p,Y,f,G,C,U)C,N,p,G,x,X,T,U,K,g,f,Y,t=function(B,d)local R=K(d)local i=function(i,c,o,q,k)return p(B,{i,c,o,q;k},d,R)end return i
